title: Help & Support
subtitle: Simple guides to help you succeed with RetailMind AI
quickStartDesc: Get up and running in 5 minutes
guide1Step1: 1. Add your first product with name, price, and stock
guide1Step3: 3. AI automatically tracks prices and generates insights
guide2Step3: Get detailed analysis with specific numbers
guide2Step4: AI explains reasoning behind every suggestion
guide3Step3: Alerts: Proactive notifications for market changes
guide3Step4: Analytics: Track revenue impact of decisions
featureAICopilotDesc: Ask business questions in natural language using Amazon Bedrock Nova Pro
featurePriceMonitoringDesc: Automated competitor price tracking from Amazon, Flipkart, and more
featureRecommendationsDesc: AI-generated pricing and inventory suggestions with confidence scores
featureAlertsDesc: Real-time notifications for price drops, stock risks, and opportunities
featureAnalyticsDesc: Track revenue impact and measure ROI of every decision
faq1A: Add your first product with name, price, and stock. Then add competitor URLs from Amazon or Flipkart. RetailMind AI will automatically track prices and generate recommendations.
faq2A: You provide competitor product URLs (Amazon, Flipkart, etc.), and our system monitors those prices 24/7. Price history is stored in DynamoDB for trend analysis.
faq3A: The AI Copilot uses Amazon Bedrock Nova Pro to answer your business questions in natural language. Ask things like 'What products need attention?' or 'Should I lower my price?' and get detailed analysis with specific numbers and reasoning.
faq4A: Yes! All data is encrypted and stored securely on AWS using DynamoDB and IAM security. The system runs entirely on AWS infrastructure with enterprise-grade security.
faq5A: Our AI analyzes competitor prices, your inventory, and market trends to suggest price changes, restocking alerts, and promotional opportunities. Each recommendation includes a confidence score and expected revenue impact.
faq6A: Alerts notify you of important market changes like competitor price drops (>10%), low stock risks (<5 days inventory), and pricing opportunities. The system monitors 24/7 and alerts you proactively.
